'''fongabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocabularied|vocabularied]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocabularied|vocabularied]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fongabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongabithi|fongabithi]] || [[word:fongabiji|fongabiji]] || [[word:fongabishi|fongabishi]] || [[word:fongabiki|fongabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongabuthuthu|fongabuthuthu]] || [[word:fongabujuju|fongabujuju]] || [[word:fongabushushu|fongabushushu]] || [[word:fongabukuku|fongabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongabuthu|fongabuthu]] || [[word:fongabuju|fongabuju]] || [[word:fongabushu|fongabushu]] || [[word:fongabuku|fongabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongabufthuf|fongabufthuf]] || [[word:fongabufjuf|fongabufjuf]] || [[word:fongabufshuf|fongabufshuf]] || [[word:fongabufkuf|fongabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongabethe|fongabethe]] || [[word:fongabeje|fongabeje]] || [[word:fongabeshe|fongabeshe]] || [[word:fongabeke|fongabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongabothotho|fongabothotho]] || [[word:fongabojojo|fongabojojo]] || [[word:fongaboshosho|fongaboshosho]] || [[word:fongabokoko|fongabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongabotho|fongabotho]] || [[word:fongabojo|fongabojo]] || [[word:fongabosho|fongabosho]] || [[word:fongaboko|fongaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongabofthof|fongabofthof]] || [[word:fongabofjof|fongabofjof]] || [[word:fongabofshof|fongabofshof]] || [[word:fongabofkof|fongabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongabïfthïf|fongabïfthïf]] || [[word:fongabïfjïf|fongabïfjïf]] || [[word:fongabïfshïf|fongabïfshïf]] || [[word:fongabïfkïf|fongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongabïfthïfthïf|fongabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fongabïfjïfjïf|fongabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fongabïfshïfshïf|fongabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fongabïfkïfkïf|fongabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongabïfthïf|fongabïfthïf]] || [[word:fongabïfjïf|fongabïfjïf]] || [[word:fongabïfshïf|fongabïfshïf]] || [[word:fongabïfkïf|fongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongabïfthïf|fongabïfthïf]] || [[word:fongabïfjïf|fongabïfjïf]] || [[word:fongabïfshïf|fongabïfshïf]] || [[word:fongabïfkïf|fongabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongabæthæ|fongabæthæ]] || [[word:fongabæjæ|fongabæjæ]] || [[word:fongabæshæ|fongabæshæ]] || [[word:fongabækæ|fongabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongabathatha|fongabathatha]] || [[word:fongabajaja|fongabajaja]] || [[word:fongabashasha|fongabashasha]] || [[word:fongabakaka|fongabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongabatha|fongabatha]] || [[word:fongabaja|fongabaja]] || [[word:fongabasha|fongabasha]] || [[word:fongabaka|fongabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongabafthaf|fongabafthaf]] || [[word:fongabafjaf|fongabafjaf]] || [[word:fongabafshaf|fongabafshaf]] || [[word:fongabafkaf|fongabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fongabasha|fongabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongabshësha|fongabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongabrosha|fongabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongabmusha|fongabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongabyasha|fongabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongabnkshësha|gofongabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongabnkrosha|gofongabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongabnkmusha|gofongabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongabnkyasha|gofongabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fongangabasha|fongangabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongangabshësha|fongangabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongangabrosha|fongangabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongangabmusha|fongangabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongangabyasha|fongangabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongangabnkshësha|gofongangabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongangabnkrosha|gofongangabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongangabnkmusha|gofongangabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongangabnkyasha|gofongangabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fengæbasha|fengæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fengæbshësha|fengæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fengæbrosha|fengæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fengæbmusha|fengæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fengæbyasha|fengæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofengæbnkshësha|gofengæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofengæbnkrosha|gofengæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofengæbnkmusha|gofengæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofengæbnkyasha|gofengæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fongfabasha|fongfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongfabshësha|fongfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongfabrosha|fongfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongfabmusha|fongfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongfabyasha|fongfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongfabnkshësha|gofongfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongfabnkrosha|gofongfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongfabnkmusha|gofongfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongfabnkyasha|gofongfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
